Express Permit Review Plus

Need a faster read before a bid, offer, listing, investor call, or client commitment? Ask about Express Permit Review Plus.

Express Permit Review Plus is $300 when available.

Rush first-pass public-record review for time-sensitive decisions. Target turnaround is 4 business hours or less when source access and schedule allow.

Express availability depends on request time, property complexity, source availability, and public portal access. This is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, or permit approval guarantee.

Ask About Express Review

What you get

✓
Decision Snapshot for one address and one decision.
✓
Official Source Checklist showing which public records were checked.
✓
PermitPulse Research Log with searches, portals, dates, and source limits.
✓
What We Checked across permit history, parcel clues, scope, status, finals, and mismatches.
✓
What We Found in plain English, including record signals and gaps.
✓
What Needs Manual Confirmation before relying on the record.
✓
Recommended Next Move for what to ask, request, confirm, or pause.
✓
Evidence Pack with screenshots, links, and official-source references where available.

What it is not

✓
Not full permit management software.
✓
Not a city portal or government service.
✓
Not a permit expeditor filing service.
✓
Not a legal, architectural, title, survey, or approval opinion.
Public records only. Some documents may be restricted, require owner authorization, specific identifiers, appointments, or agency processing time. Plan sets and blueprints require owner authorization. If access is restricted, we document the limitation and provide next-step options. This is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, or permit approval guarantee.

Ask About Express Intake Form
Target turnaround is 4 business hours or less when source access and schedule allow. Express does not guarantee agency response times, permit outcomes, or approval decisions.

Intake

Submit the address and decision. If you already paid, submit this and we’ll start immediately.

What to include
Address, permit number if known, deadline, and what you need verified. Useful context: bid, buy, build, list, quote, ADU, remodel, unpermitted work, or permit claim.
This is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, or permit approval guarantee.
Submit

After submit: you’ll get a confirmation. If you already paid, include the address and we’ll start.

How it works

01 / Intake

Address, permit number if known, goal, deadline, and the decision you need to make.

02 / Research

Official-source checklist, public-record searches, source notes, and access limits go into the PermitPulse Research Log.

03 / Delivery

PDF Decision Snapshot with What We Checked, What We Found, What Needs Manual Confirmation, Recommended Next Move, and Evidence Pack where available.

FAQ

Can you pull full plan sets?

Sometimes plan sets are restricted. If authorization is required, you’ll get a clear list of what’s needed and what public alternatives exist (permit cards, inspection history, correction notices, public attachments).

What if a document can’t be retrieved?

You still receive the Permit Review plus a “missing items + next steps” list. Retrieval fees are not charged if a document is not obtained.

Is this a permit expeditor service?

No. PermitPulse does not file applications, manage city corrections, or represent the project at the counter. It is a first-pass public-record intelligence report for one address.

What sources do you check?

We check available public permit, parcel, zoning, planning, assessor-style, and official-source records where available for the address and jurisdiction.

Is this legal advice?

No. This is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, or permit approval guarantee. For legal, design, field, title, or survey questions, use the appropriate licensed professional.
